rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Verify capabilities BEFORE asserting, not after.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Source-verification maintainer block on any student-facing file with practitioner citations.
Verification machinery needs a smoke-test before being trusted.
A rule in memory that does not force is worse than no rule.
Installed Claude Code Skills invoke by name, never by path.
Multi-sample methods need structural enforcement in the prompt.
